name: goallll-landing
description: Marketing landing page variations for goallll iOS app

scripts.predev: mkdir -p public/src/img public/src/shared public/src/css public/src/js public/privacy public/terms public/legal && cp ../src/img/*.png src/img/ && cp ../src/img/*.png public/src/img/ && cp -r src/shared/* public/src/shared/ && cp ../legal/src/css/legal.css public/src/css/ && cp ../legal/src/js/legal.js public/src/js/ && cp ../legal/privacy/index.html public/privacy/ && cp ../legal/terms/index.html public/terms/ && cp ../legal/index.html public/legal/
